ddls:
CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each PAC */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the PAC */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the PAC */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the PAC is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the PAC is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the PAC */,
  "treasurer_name" TEXT /* Name of the treasurer for the PAC */,
  "committee_type" TEXT /* Type of committee (e.g., Super PAC, Hybrid PAC, Non-connected PAC) */,
  "filing_frequency" TEXT /* Filing frequency (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Primary funding source (e.g., corporate, individual, union) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the committee's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the committee */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the committee */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the committee was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the committee (e.g., active, inactive, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office the candidate is running for (e.g., H, S) */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate (e.g., REP, DEM) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the candidate is running */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the candidate is running */,
  "incumbent" TEXT /* Indicates if the candidate is an incumbent (e.g., Y, N) */,
  "election_year" TEXT /* Year of the election */,
  "party_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's party */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the candidate */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the candidate */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate was added to the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the candidate (e.g., running, withdrawn, elected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "committee_id" TEXT /* ID of the PAC making the transaction */,
  "candidate_id" TEXT /* ID of the candidate receiving the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., 24K, 48H) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity making the transaction (e.g., PAC, individual) */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., cash, in-kind, loan) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., check, credit card, wire transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "is_earmarked" TEXT /* Indicates if the contribution is earmarked for a specific purpose (e.g., Y, N) */,
  "earmark_description" TEXT /* Description of the earmarked purpose */,
  "is_refund" TEXT /* Indicates if the transaction is a refund (e.g., Y, N) */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the transaction */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contributor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the contributor is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the contributor is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the contributor */,
  "contributor_type" TEXT /* Type of contributor (e.g., individual, corporation, union) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the contributor */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Name of the contributor's employer */,
  "is_self_funded" TEXT /* Indicates if the contributor is self-funded (e.g., Y, N) */,
  "contribution_limit" TEXT /* Contribution limit for the contributor */,
  "total_contributions" TEXT /* Total contributions made by the contributor */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the contributor record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor record was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the contributor record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_transactions" (
  "contributor_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor transaction */,
  "contributor_id" TEXT /* ID of the contributor making the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being made */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., cash, in-kind, loan) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., check, credit card, wire transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "is_earmarked" TEXT /* Indicates if the contribution is earmarked for a specific purpose (e.g., Y, N) */,
  "earmark_description" TEXT /* Description of the earmarked purpose */,
  "is_refund" TEXT /* Indicates if the transaction is a refund (e.g., Y, N) */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the transaction */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_transactions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
